description: Quality gate for any deliverable — scores a draft against dimensions like accuracy, voice, structure, completeness, and actionability
usage: audit, quality check, qa, review draft, check my work, quality gate

target.description: The deliverable to audit — a file, upstream chain output, or pasted content

criteria.description: Quality dimensions to score against — comma-separated

standard.description: Quality bar: draft (early feedback), professional (send-ready), publication (public-facing)
